name: tkn-codex-context-engineering
description: Initialize Codex projects, read and refresh private project context, search and review Codex chats across projects, and manage sessions, decisions, memos, freshness, and distillation.

interface.shortDescription: Read and maintain private Codex project context
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for project initialization through .tkn/codex-context.yaml, read-only current-project orientation from private working dashboards, project-scoped refresh from Codex chat history, sessions, decisions, memos, cross-project chat search and review, distillation, and freshness audits.
defaultPrompt: Read this project's current working context
Refresh this project's session notes, decisions, and working context from Codex chat history
Resume an existing project session note
